author: GenePattern
plan:
## SOMClustering GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
SOMClustering is a GenePattern module that Self-Organizing Maps algorithm

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 14 parameters:
- Required: dataset.filename, output.stub, cluster.range, seed.range, iterations, som.rows, som.cols, initialization, neighborhood, alpha.initial, alpha.final, sigma.initial, sigma.final
- Optional: cluster.by

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -Domnigene.conf\=<java.io.tmpdir><file.separator>gp<file.separator>resources -cp <libdir>trove.jar<path.separator><libdir>jaxb-rt-1.0-ea.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-common.jar<path.separator><libdir>common_cmdline.jar<path.separator><libdir>RunSomAlg.jar<path.separator><libdir>file_support.jar<path.separator><libdir>archiver.jar<path.separator><libdir>broad-cg.jar<path.separator><libdir>jakarta-oro-2.0.8.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-modules.jar edu.mit.genome.gp.executers.RunSomAlg <dataset.filename> <cluster.range> <iterations> <seed.range> <som.rows> <som.cols> <initialization> <neighborhood> <alpha.initial> <alpha.final> <sigma.initial> <sigma.final> <output.stub> <cluster.by>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: cluster.range
parameters.description: Range of values can be entered and the program will automatically run the algorithm for each number of clusters in the range.

parameters.name: seed.range
parameters.description: The seed for the random number generator, is exposed to allow the user to recreate a given session at a later time, (as opposed to allowing the program to generate a random initial seed which could result in different outcomes even if all the other parameters are identical).

parameters.name: iterations
parameters.description: How many times the algorithm should try to refine the clusters. Initially, this value can be set low for faster exploration, but should be set high (e.g., 50,000) for good convergence.

parameters.name: cluster.by
parameters.description: Whether to cluster by rows or columns

parameters.name: som.rows
parameters.description: Setting this and som.cols to a non zero value will override cluster.range and the computation will be for the specified geometry

parameters.name: som.cols
parameters.description: Setting this and som.rows to a non zero value will override cluster.range and the computation will be for the specified geometry

parameters.name: initialization
parameters.description: How to select inital random centroids

parameters.name: neighborhood
parameters.description: Neighborhood function determining how centroids near the target centroid are updated

parameters.name: alpha.initial
parameters.description: Initial learning weight for centroid updates

parameters.name: alpha.final
parameters.description: Final learning weight for centroid updates

parameters.name: sigma.initial
parameters.description: Initial sigma to determine update neighborhood size around the target centroid

parameters.name: sigma.final
parameters.description: Final sigma to determine update neighborhood size around the target centroid
